interaction_phrase: NATO's Defence Innovation Accelerator for the North Atlantic (DIANA)
occurrence_sentence: On Thursday (14 March 2024), NATO's Defence Innovation Accelerator for the North Atlantic (DIANA) announced a major expansion of its transatlantic network of accelerator sites and test centres.
target_actor: Defence Innovation Accelerator for the North Atlantic (DIANA)

interaction_phrase: NATO's Defence Innovation Accelerator for the North Atlantic (DIANA)
occurrence_sentence: DIANA's network will now comprise 23 accelerator sites (up from 11) and 182 test centres (up from 90) in 28 Allied countries, augmenting DIANA's capacity to support innovators from across the Alliance as they develop their technologies.
target_actor: Defence Innovation Accelerator for the North Atlantic (DIANA)

interaction_phrase: NATO's Defence Innovation Accelerator for the North Atlantic (DIANA)
occurrence_sentence: Addressing media at NATO Headquarters on Thursday, Secretary General Jens Stoltenberg welcomed the addition of the new sites.
target_actor: Defence Innovation Accelerator for the North Atlantic (DIANA)
